seo.title: Contribution Fund - Virtual Coins | {{siteName}} - Your Exclusive Currency
seo.description: Manage your Virtual Coins in the {{siteName}} private club. Earn points from contributions, memberships, and guests. Redeem your Virtual Coins for exclusive discounts on premium benefits.
seo.keywords: Virtual Coins, private club points, {{siteName}} currency, contribution fund, redeem points, earn points, exclusive discounts, {{siteName}} wallet, {{siteName}} rewards, Colombia rewards
seo.schemaDescription: Points and rewards system of the {{siteName}} private club.
seo.schemaServiceDescription: Exclusive private club currency redeemable for discounts and benefits

unauthenticated.bannerDescription: Virtual Coins are your exclusive currency within the club. Use them to acquire catalog benefits, receive them as a membership perk, or earn them by referring new members.
unauthenticated.accessTitle: Sign in to access your Contribution Fund
unauthenticated.accessReason: You need an account to view and manage your Virtual Coins.
unauthenticated.accessDescription: Create your free account and start earning Virtual Coins to use on your contributions.

disclaimer.title: About Virtual Coins
disclaimer.compactText: Virtual Coins are the exclusive payment method for catalog benefits. Memberships are paid with real money.
disclaimer.item1Desc: Virtual Coins are the club's internal currency for acquiring catalog benefits.
disclaimer.item2Desc: Earn FC from guests, package acquisitions, or as a benefit of your monthly membership.
disclaimer.item3Desc: Club memberships can only be purchased with real money, not with Virtual Coins.
disclaimer.item4Desc: You can share your Virtual Coins with other club members using their invitation code.
disclaimer.footer: Virtual Coins have no monetary value outside the {{siteName}} ecosystem and are non-refundable.

balance.title: My Virtual Coins Balance
balance.unavailable: The Virtual Coins system is not available for your user role or is currently disabled.
